zh.lifeSummary: 當Joanna Moels於1303年出生在英國戴文金斯可斯維爾時，她的父親John de Moels 1st Baron Moels34歲，母親Maude de Grey32歲。她於1325年1月與Sir Henry De La Pomeroy在英國薩默塞特結婚。他們至少是6個兒子和1個女兒的父母。她去世於1359年4月16日在英國英格蘭戴文貝里 波梅洛易享年56歲，埋葬在英國戴文貝里 波梅洛易。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Joanna Moels于1303年出生在英国戴文金斯可斯維爾时，她的父亲John de Moels 1st Baron Moels34岁，母亲Maude de Grey32岁。她于1325年1月与Sir Henry De La Pomeroy在英国薩默塞特结婚。他们至少是6个儿子和1个女儿的父母。她去世于1359年4月16日在英国英格兰戴文貝里 波梅洛易享年56岁，埋葬在英国戴文貝里 波梅洛易。

nameMeanings.name: Moels
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English: variant of Moll , with genitival or post-medieval excrescent -s.
Catalan: habitational name from any of various minor places called Moles, from the plural of mola (see Mola ).
English (of Norman origin): habitational name from Meulles (Calvados). See also   Moyles  .

variants.name: Moll
meanings: English (Norfolk): from the Middle English female personal name Moll(e), Mol, a common pet form of Maud (see Mould and Maude ).

English (Norfolk): nickname from Middle English molle, mol(e), moul ‘mole’ (the burrowing animal), given perhaps to someone who wore moleskin, a mole catcher, or to someone with poor sight, or alternatively from Middle English mol ‘effeminate man’.
German: nickname from a dialect term for a plump, stout person. This surname is also found in France (Alsace and Lorraine) and Poland.

nameMeanings.name: Joanna
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: From the Latin form, Io(h)anna, of Greek Iōanna, the feminine equivalent of Iōannēs ( see John ). In the New Testament, this name is borne by a woman who was one of Jesus's followers (Luke 8:3; 24:10). She was the wife of the steward of the household of King Herod Antipas. The name was regularly used throughout the Middle Ages in most parts of Europe as a feminine equivalent of John , but in England it has only been in common use as a vernacular given name since the 19th century. Celebrated British bearers of the name include the novelist Joanna Trollope ( b. 1943 ), the actress Joanna Lumley ( b. 1946 ), and the concert pianist Joanna McGregor ( b. 1959 ).

historicEvents.title: Famine Strikes Europe
historicEvents.description: A famine caused by cold winters and wet summers across Europe caused millions to die due to starvation. Desperation from hunger caused high levels of crime, stampedes in bread lines in London, infanticide, and even cannibalism throughout Europe.

historicEvents.title: First War of Scottish Independence
historicEvents.description: The First War of Scottish Independence began after England invaded Scotland in 1296. The Treaty of Edinburgh was signed in 1328 which declared peace between the two kingdoms and brought the war to an end.

historicEvents.title: The Hundred Years' War
historicEvents.description: The Hundred Years' War between France and England was largely due to the question of legitimate succession to the French crown.

en.lifeSummary: When Joanna Moels was born in 1303, in Kingskerswell, Devon, England, her father, John de Moels 1st Baron Moels, was 34 and her mother, Maude de Grey, was 32. She married Sir Henry De La Pomeroy in January 1325, in Somerset, England. They were the parents of at least 6 sons and 1 daughter. She died on 16 April 1359, in Berry Pomeroy, Devon, England, United Kingdom, at the age of 56, and was buried in Berry Pomeroy, Devon, England.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Joanna Moels est née en 1303, à Kingskerswell, Devon, Angleterre, son père, John de Moels 1st Baron Moels, avait 34 ans et sa mère, Maude de Grey, avait 32 ans. Elle a épousé Sir Henry De La Pomeroy en janvier 1325, à Somerset, Angleterre. Ils ont eu au moins 6 fils et 1 fille. Elle est décédée le 16 avril 1359, à Berry Pomeroy, Devon, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, à l’âge de 56 ans, et a été enterrée à Berry Pomeroy, Devon, Angleterre.

de.lifeSummary: Als Joanna Moels 1303 in Kingskerswell, Devon, England geboren wurde, war ihr Vater John de Moels 1st Baron Moels 34 und ihre Mutter Maude de Grey 32. Sie hat im Januar 1325 in Somerset, England Sir Henry De La Pomeroy geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 6 Söhne und 1 Tochter. Sie starb am 16. April 1359 im Alter von 56 Jahren in Berry Pomeroy, Devon, England, United Kingdom und wurde in Berry Pomeroy, Devon, England begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Joanna Moels è nata il nel 1303 nel Kingskerswell, Devon, England, sua padre, John de Moels 1st Baron Moels, aveva 34 anni e sua madre, Maude de Grey, aveva 32 anni. Lei sposato Sir Henry De La Pomeroy nel gennaio 1325, nel Somerset, England. Erano genitori di almeno 6 figli e 1 figlia. Morì il 16 aprile 1359, nel Berry Pomeroy, Devon, Inghilterra, Regno Unito, all'età di 56 anni, e fu sepolta a Berry Pomeroy, Devon, England.

ja.lifeSummary: Joanna Moelsが1303年にイギリスデボンキングスケルスウエルで生まれた時，父John de Moels 1st Baron Moelsは34歳，母Maude de Greyは32歳であった。1325年1月にイギリスソメルセトでSir Henry De La Pomeroyと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも6人の息子と1人の娘の親であった。彼女は1359年4月16日にイギリスイギリスデボンバーリー ポメロイで56歳で死去し，イギリスデボンバーリー ポメロイにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Joanna Moels(이)가 1303년 영국 데폰 킨그스커스웰에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 John de Moels 1st Baron Moels(은)는 34세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Maude de Grey(은)는 32세였다. 그녀는 1325년 1월 영국 서머세트에서 Sir Henry De La Pomeroy(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 여섯 명의 아들과 한 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1359년 4월 16일 영국 잉글랜드 데폰 베리 폼로이에서 56세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 데폰 베리 폼로이에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Joanna Moels nasceu em 1303, em Kingskerswell, Devon, Inglaterra, seu pai, John de Moels 1st Baron Moels, tinha 34 anos e sua mãe, Maude de Grey, tinha 32 anos. Ela casou-se com Sir Henry De La Pomeroy em janeiro de 1325, em Somerset, Inglaterra. Eles tiveram pelo menos 6 filhos e 1 filha. Ela faleceu em 16 de abril de 1359, em Berry Pomeroy, Devon, Inglaterra, United Kingdom, com 56 anos, e foi sepultada em Berry Pomeroy, Devon, Inglaterra.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Joanna Moels родилась в 1303 г. в местности кингскирсвелл, девон, Англия, её отцу по имени John de Moels 1st Baron Moels было 34 года, а матери, которую звали Maude de Grey, 32. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Sir Henry De La Pomeroy январь 1325 г. в местности сомирсет, Англия. У них было по крайней мере 6 сыновей и 1 дочь. Она умерла 16 апреля 1359 г. в местности бирри помирои, девон, Англия, Великобритания в возрасте 56 лет и была похоронена в местности бирри помирои, девон, Англия.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Joanna Moels nació en 1303, en Kingskerswell, Devon, Inglaterra, su papá, John de Moels 1st Baron Moels, tenía 34 años y su mamá, Maude de Grey, tenía 32 años. Se casó con Sir Henry De La Pomeroy en enero de 1325, en Somerset, Inglaterra. Fueron padres de por lo menos 6 hijos y 1 hija. Murió el 16 de abril de 1359, en Berry Pomeroy, Devon, Inglaterra, Reino Unido, a la edad de 56 años, y fue sepultada en Berry Pomeroy, Devon, Inglaterra.
